## Open Source Scope

- [ ] This change only adds original code/documentation, or asset provenance has been documented
- [ ] Third-party IP, trademarks, screenshots, press images, generated images, and composites are not being relicensed by implication
- [ ] The tone remains corporate, restrained, and operational rather than wiki-like or fanpage-like

## Local Testing

- [ ] Opened the changed route locally
- [ ] Checked mobile layout
- [ ] Ran `node --check app.js` if JavaScript changed
- [ ] Updated `assets/ATTRIBUTION.md` if assets changed
